hero_description: Computer Engineering student at Corporación Universitaria Unilasallista
about_bio_1: My name is Juan Sebastián Martínez, though my friends call me Juanse. I'm a Computer Engineering student at Unilasallista. I started programming at 12 with robotics at Comfama, a passion that led me to co-found my university's robotics club using mBots.
about_bio_2: I have represented my major in various academic fairs, motivating future students to explore technology. My goal is to develop innovative software tools and solutions.
proj1_desc: Object and biological species detection using classification neural networks. Trained with custom datasets.
proj2_desc: Interactive mockup of a Progressive Web App for personal expense management. Usability-focused design.
proj3_desc: Central repository for the robotics club, focused on hardware and software development for autonomous systems.
proj4_desc: Intelligent system designed to assist seniors with Alzheimer's using local AI and automated flows.
